description: Discover your funky yet feminine side with the puma Echo backpack. The colour adds glamour to your look, while the padded backstraps hold the bag in place. Length: 31.5 cm Made of polyester and nylon, with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and durability One main copiously spaced chamber One front zippered compartment with multiple pouches Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Branding in screen print across the length of the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
